name: cursorblame
description: Inline git blame on the active cursor line — hover to reveal, click to open the commit on your remote.

commands.title: CursorBlame: Open Pull Request / Merge Request
CursorBlame: Go to Next Line from Same Commit
CursorBlame: Go to Previous Line from Same Commit
CursorBlame: Peek Diff for Current Commit

cursorblame.enabled.description: Enable or disable inline blame annotations.

cursorblame.format.markdownDescription: Format template for the blame annotation. Available tokens: `{author}`, `{timeAgo}`, `{date}`, `{summary}`, `{sha}`, `{shortSha}`. You can also use a built-in preset name: `minimal`, `verbose`, `heatmap`, `team`.

cursorblame.maxSummaryLength.description: Maximum characters of the commit summary to display before truncating.

cursorblame.foregroundColor.markdownDescription: Color for the blame annotation text. Leave empty for a muted theme-aware default. Accepts any CSS color (e.g. `#888888`, `rgba(128,128,128,0.7)`) or a theme token prefixed with `theme:` (e.g. `theme:editorCodeLens.foreground`).

cursorblame.debounceMs.description: Milliseconds to wait after the cursor stops moving before showing blame.

cursorblame.ignoreWhitespace.description: Ignore whitespace-only changes when computing blame (passes -w to git blame).

enumDescriptions: Clear and redebounce the annotation on every selection change.
Keep the annotation visible while typing on the same line; only update when the cursor moves to a different line.
cursorblame.mode.description: Controls when the blame annotation refreshes.

cursorblame.followMerges.description: Pass --first-parent to git blame to skip merge commits when assigning blame.

cursorblame.ageFadeMaxDays.description: Commits older than this many days are shown at minimum opacity (0.35). Set to 0 to disable age-based fading.

cursorblame.gutterMode.description: Show compact blame annotations (initials + SHA) on every line simultaneously.

cursorblame.authorColors.description: Colorise blame annotations per-author using a stable hash-derived palette colour.

cursorblame.ignoredAuthors.markdownDescription: List of author names or email addresses to skip in blame output. Partial matches are supported (e.g. `"bot@"` matches `ci-bot@company.com`).

cursorblame.gutterRecentDays.markdownDescription: When `cursorblame.gutterMode` is enabled, only show gutter annotations for lines changed within this many days. Set to `0` to annotate all lines regardless of age.

cursorblame.hotspotEnabled.description: Show fire-badge hotspot decorations in the Explorer for files with high commit churn. Disable to remove the badges without affecting other features.
